title: The Wanderer at Dusk
description: One of Staton's most atmospheric early pieces. The figure stands at the edge of the Ashfeld Reaches, caught between two worlds.
statonNotes: I painted this during the writing of the Forest Arc. Elara didn't know where she was going yet. Neither did I.

title: The Silent Court Convenes
description: A rare full ensemble piece showing all seven members of the Silent Court at their founding assembly.
statonNotes: Getting all seven into one frame without it feeling crowded took about three restarts. Kael is the one not looking at the table.

title: Sable in the Rain
description: A quieter piece. Sable alone on the bridge after the events of Volume 4. No weapons. No armor.
